chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-1801 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection No.1 & 9. 2. For orders on CMA No.8967/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.8968/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous date. Under such circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
